welcome_subtitle: AI assistant for work, documents and life in Russia.
tagline: AI assistant for migrants, documents and job search
desc: One assistant for job search, employer verification, document translation, legal help and migration questions.

step1_d: Ask a question or describe the problem
step2_d: AI will recognize and translate documents
features_d1: Only verified employers with ratings and reviews
features_d2: Check INN, OGRN, blacklist and fraud risks
features_d3: OCR, translation and analysis of documents in 4 languages

chat_desc: Ask any question — I'll figure out: job search, translation, documents, employer, lawyer or migration.
ai_hello: Hi! I'm VaxtaGo AI. Ask a question — I'll understand what to help with.
about_text: VaxtaGo is an AI platform for labor migrants. We combine job search, employer verification, document translation, legal help and migration services in one premium interface.
about_founder: Founder and idea author: Dmitry Diev. Platform created with ChatGPT.
privacy_text: VaxtaGo respects user privacy. We do not share personal data with third parties without consent. All AI requests are processed via secure Edge Functions. Document data is stored encrypted.
terms_text: By using VaxtaGo you agree to the terms of service. The platform provides informational help and does not guarantee employment. Employers are responsible for vacancy accuracy.
